title: cyperus ovularis
intro: Cyperus ovularis, also known as Tuckahoe, is a type of underground plant stem or rhizome that belongs to the sedge family. Traditionally, it has been used in medicine for its various health benefits, including its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as lowering blood pressure, reducing fever, and aiding in digestion. Cyperus ovularis can be prepared in various forms, including tea, tincture, and powder, which are often used to treat different health conditions.
